name: iobroker.nexowatt-e3dc
description: ioBroker adapter for E3/DC RSCP systems with EMS read/write support plus BAT, PVI, WB and idle periods
author: Nexowatt

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check lib/rscp-client.js && node --check lib/rscp-codec.js && node --check lib/rscp-tags.js
